ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the carrier operating the flight */,
  "origin_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin airport */,
  "dest_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination airport */,
  "crs_dep_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "crs_arr_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "actual_dep_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time */,
  "actual_arr_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  "arr_delay" INTEGER /* Arrival delay in minutes (negative values indicate early arrivals) */,
  "crs_elapsed_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled elapsed time in minutes */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance between the origin and destination airports in miles */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the flight */,
  "day_of_month" INTEGER /* Day of the month of the flight */,
  "day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week of the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique flight number within the carrier */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used for the flight */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crew assigned to the flight */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number at the origin and destination airports */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal at the origin and destination airports */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at departure and arrival */,
  "fuel_consumption" INTEGER /* Fuel consumption of the flight */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "cargo_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the cargo on the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_dest_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("dest_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carrier */,
  "carrier_code" TEXT /* Code of the carrier */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the carrier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the carrier */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the carrier */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the carrier was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the carrier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in feet */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the airport */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight with the delay */,
  "delay_type" TEXT /* Type of delay (e.g., departure, arrival) */,
  "delay_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "delay_category" TEXT /* Category of the delay (e.g., operational, weather, air traffic control) */,
  "delay_source" TEXT /* Source of the delay (e.g., carrier, airport, ATC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled flight */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the carrier operating the flight */,
  "origin_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin airport */,
  "dest_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination airport */,
  "weekdays" TEXT /* Days of the week the flight operates (e.g., 'Mon,Wed,Fri') */,
  "crs_dep_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "crs_arr_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "crs_elapsed_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled elapsed time in minutes */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance between the origin and destination airports in miles */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the flight (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the schedule became effective */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the schedule will terminate */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_dest_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("dest_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_origin_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being updated */,
  "status_type" TEXT /* Type of status (e.g., departure, arrival, cancellation) */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status update */,
  "status_message" TEXT /* Message describing the status update */,
  "status_code" TEXT /* Code representing the status (e.g., ON, DL, CN) */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number at the time of the status update */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time for the status (e.g., estimated arrival time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operational staff, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the carrier */,
  "origin_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin airport */,
  "dest_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination airport */,
  "total_flights" INTEGER /* Total number of flights */,
  "average_arr_delay" REAL /* Average arrival delay in minutes */,
  "max_arr_delay" INTEGER /* Maximum arrival delay in minutes */,
  "min_arr_delay" INTEGER /* Minimum arrival delay in minutes */,
  "total_distance" INTEGER /* Total distance traveled */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers */,
  "total_cargo_weight" INTEGER /* Total cargo weight */,
  "total_fuel_consumption" INTEGER /* Total fuel consumption */,
  "average_fuel_consumption" REAL /* Average fuel consumption per flight */,
  "total_cancellations" INTEGER /* Total number of cancellations */,
  "total_diversions" INTEGER /* Total number of diversions */,
  "average_weather_delay" REAL /* Average weather delay */,
  "average_air_traffic_control_delay" REAL /* Average air traffic control delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_dest_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("dest_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_origin_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)
